assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 extracts the Upstream Affected Component (axios) from customfield_10632 and uses it to search for related CVE Jiras (§1.59)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md Prerequisites Check table shows 'Upstream Affected Component | customfield_10632 | axios'. The JQL search uses this value: 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND cf[10632] ~ "axios" AND key != TC-8010'. The field is explicitly extracted from customfield_10632 and used as the search term.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 filters search results by matching PS Component (customfield_10669 = pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui) and Stream (customfield_10832 = rhtpa-2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md Filtering section explicitly shows TC-8008 matched on all three criteria: 'PS Component: pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui = pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui (match)' and 'Stream: rhtpa-2.2 = rhtpa-2.2 (match)'. The prerequisites table confirms customfield_10669 and customfield_10832 are the source fields.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 traverses issuelinks on TC-8008 to find remediation task TC-8009 via the 'Depend' link type
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md Issue Link Traversal section: 'TC-8008 has the following issue links: Depend: TC-8009 (remediation Task)' with summary 'Bump axios to 1.9.0 in rhtpa-ui [rhtpa-2.2]' and status 'In Progress'. The traversal explicitly follows the Depend link type from TC-8008 to TC-8009.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 compares the remediation task's bump version (1.9.0) against the current CVE's fix threshold (1.8.2) and determines the fix is already covered
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md Remediation Coverage Comparison table: 'Current CVE (TC-8010) fix threshold | >= 1.8.2', 'Existing remediation task (TC-8009) bump target | 1.9.0', 'Comparison | 1.9.0 >= 1.8.2', 'Result | COVERED -- existing remediation meets or exceeds fix threshold'.

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing the issue because existing remediation task TC-8009 already bumps axios past the fix threshold — no new remediation task is created
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md states 'Decision: Close as covered by existing remediation -- no new remediation task needed.' and 'Recommendation: Close TC-8010 as the fix is already covered by TC-8009. The completion of TC-8009 (axios bump to 1.9.0) will remediate both CVE-2026-42035 and CVE-2026-44492.' No new remediation task creation is mentioned anywhere in the outputs.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 creates a Related link between the current CVE (TC-8010) and the related CVE (TC-8008) with an idempotency check on existing issuelinks before creating
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md Proposed Actions item 1: 'Create Related link between TC-8010 and TC-8008 (same upstream component): Check existing issuelinks on TC-8010 -- no existing links found. Create: jira.create_link(inwardIssue: TC-8010, outwardIssue: TC-8008, type: "Related")'. The idempotency check on existing issuelinks is performed before the link creation.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 creates a Depend link from the covering remediation task (TC-8009) to the current CVE (TC-8010) with an idempotency check on existing issuelinks before creating
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md Proposed Actions item 2: 'Create Depend link from TC-8010 to TC-8009 (covering remediation): Check existing issuelinks on TC-8010 -- no existing links found. Create: jira.create_link(inwardIssue: TC-8010, outwardIssue: TC-8009, type: "Depend")'. The idempotency check on existing issuelinks is performed before the link creation.

assertion_results.text: A comment is posted on the current CVE documenting the cross-CVE overlap finding — including the related CVE key (TC-8008), covering task key (TC-8009), library (axios), bump version (1.9.0), and fix threshold (1.8.2)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md Proposed Actions item 3 shows 'Post comment on TC-8010 documenting the cross-CVE overlap' with comment text: 'Cross-CVE overlap: existing remediation task TC-8009 (from CVE-2026-42035 / TC-8008) already bumps axios to 1.9.0, which meets or exceeds this CVE's fix threshold (1.8.2).' All required elements are present: TC-8008 (related CVE key), TC-8009 (covering task key), axios (library), 1.9.0 (bump version), 1.8.2 (fix threshold).
